_comment: Human-owned exceptions to the grounding gate (check-related-pages-grounding.py). Each entry is a connection that is genuinely public but not restated as prose on the linking page, reviewed and cleared by Lucas 2026-07-17. hub_targets: overview/utility pages any page may link. public_names: NOT_YET_PUBLIC entities whose name is public (currently none; Izar was promoted to a full public page instead). pages: per-page target exceptions with reasons.

magic/miracles.md.edrion-voldis: public two-hop: miracles.md publicly names House Voldis as its practitioners; this royal's public infobox declares house: House Voldis. gm-only detail (Usurpation, Edrion's Phoenix immortality) stays hidden.
magic/miracles.md.valthis-voldis: public two-hop: House Voldis publicly holds Miracles; this royal is publicly House Voldis. The Kingslayer/assassination tie stays gm-only.

magic/splendor-magic.md.miracles: public: the One Above's page publicly names him as the source of both Splendor Magic and Miracles, so the two are publicly linked
